title: "0.6.0 Release Notes"

<!-- generated by packages/cli/src/generate/project-docs-site.mjs; edit docs/release-notes/0.6.0.md -->

## npm Public Surface Convergence

0.6.0 hardens the npm surface around three audiences:

- `default-direct`: hand-written imports from `@yansirplus/cli` and
  `@yansirplus/client`.
- `generated-only`: imports emitted by generated targets, including
  `@yansirplus/runtime/workspace-binding`,
  `@yansirplus/core/runtime-protocol`, and `@yansirplus/core/tools`.
- `advanced`: backend and substrate imports such as
  `@yansirplus/runtime/cloudflare`, `@yansirplus/runtime/node`, and
  `@yansirplus/runtime/in-memory`.

The runtime root is now an explicit allowlist. It is not a mirror of runtime
source files, and root `export *` is forbidden by the structural gate.

## Breaking Changes

The following module-private submit-loop symbols are no longer exported from
`@yansirplus/runtime` root:

- `internalSubmitSpec`
- `InternalSubmitSpec`
- `submitAgentEffect`
- `buildInitialMessages`
- `DEFAULT_LLM_CALL_TIMEOUT_MS`
- `turnRefOf`

There is no compatibility alias. Consumers should move to the backend facade or
generated target surface that owns submit execution.

## Migration Table

| Old import                                                                   | New boundary                                                            |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `@yansirplus/runtime` for `internalSubmitSpec` or `InternalSubmitSpec`       | No public replacement. These are internal runtime construction details. |
| `@yansirplus/runtime` for `submitAgentEffect`                                | Use the backend submit facade or generated target API.                  |
| `@yansirplus/runtime` for workspace tool binding in generated targets        | `@yansirplus/runtime/workspace-binding`                                 |
| `@yansirplus/runtime` for runtime DTOs in generated targets                  | `@yansirplus/core/runtime-protocol`                                     |
| `@yansirplus/runtime` for tool execution helpers in generated targets        | `@yansirplus/core/tools`                                                |
| Source workspace package names such as `@agent-os/runtime` in generated apps | Run `agentos build --package-scope @yansirplus`.                        |

## Verification

The release gate now proves this against packed packages:

- generated target imports use canonical public subpaths;
- packed runtime root declarations reject removed submit-loop symbols;
- runtime module exports do not contain the removed submit-loop values.
